name: openEuler SIG Gathering 2024
description: Join the excitement at openEuler's SIG Gathering 2024. Connect with developers, explore tech insights, and experience a vibrant community like no other. This year's gathering brings together developers from all 108 SIGs in the community, with a focus on the future development of openEuler in the wake of the release of openEuler 24.03 LTS.

about.name: Diversified Computing
about.description: Explores heterogeneous computing architectures, multi-architecture support, and collaborative CPU/GPU/NPU/accelerator technologies, addressing openEuler's strategy for diversified computing power.

about.name: All-scenario Applications
about.description: Explores openEuler's capability to support comprehensive applications across servers, cloud, edge computing, and embedded systems, with a focus on performance, reliability, security, and usability enhancements.

about.name: AI-Native Support
about.description: Delves into openEuler's AI-driven innovations, covering AI-native support, intelligent interactive platforms, integrated CPU/GPU/NPU capabilities, and comprehensive AI software stacks.

about.name: Native Development with openEuler
about.description: Centers on the native development experience, discussing local development environments, package updates, community collaboration, and testing services.

about.name: Upstream-Native Support
about.description: Focuses on ensuring that upstream open-source software supports openEuler natively, including working with upstream communities, staying updated on upstream code changes, and maintaining software repositories.

about.name: User Experience Boost
about.description: Aims at enhancing knowledge sharing by delivering high-quality content and improving user experience across the openEuler community.
